name: Bruccius the Orphan
bio:
Physical Appearance: Imperial male wearing lower-class clothing, consisting of a huntsman vest and belted braies.

Race: Imperial

Personality Keywords: impoverished, persistent, compliant

Role: Beggar in the city of Cheydinhal.

Home Location Information: Sleeps outdoors behind The March Rider in Cheydinhal, near the well by the local Mages Guild, using a bedroll and food bag.

Daily Routine: Bruccius begins his day at 6am by begging near Cheydinhal’s east gate for four hours. At 10am, he moves to the Great Chapel of Arkay and continues begging until 2pm. He then relocates to the area in front of The March Rider, where he begs until evening. At 6pm, he retrieves food from his bedroll and travels to Riverview to sit on a bench and eat for two hours. After his meal, he returns to his bedroll area and wanders nearby until going to sleep at 10pm. On rainy days, he remains under the roof at Riverview until the rain stops.

Abilities: Lacks formal combat training and fights only with his fists. Close combat with him may transmit disease.

Personality – City Beggar: Bruccius lives entirely by begging and follows a fixed daily routine that takes him between major public locations in Cheydinhal. He responds to requests for information and assistance when approached and can be persuaded to share what he knows about local matters. His interactions reflect his position among the city’s poor and suffering.
author: Bethesda
